steps.title: Mark the process outcome
steps.content: The first sentence says scientists needed a model of Earth's shape for GPS. The second sentence identifies Amelia Hart's program as the way those necessary calculations could be performed, so the transition should signal a culminating result.

steps.title: Reject nonfinal signals
steps.content: B would make Hart's work a restatement, C would make it merely a second listed step, and D would make it extra information. The context instead points to the final outcome of the effort. The answer is A.
